title: XXE Vulnerability via Fallback Parser — Duplicate of S153
notes: Duplicate of S153 (@codenan42, 2026-03-05T14:02:14Z) which was verified YES_WITH_CAVEATS. S224 was submitted 2026-03-06T08:09:36Z — over 18 hours later — reporting the identical issue: defusedxml fallback to stdlib xml.etree.ElementTree in deps_support.py:10-13. No credit for duplicates.
